mapper.sql: id, user_id, account_id, name, amount, rate, type, months, repay_method, status, due_date, remark, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM account_debt WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_debt (user_id, account_id, name, amount, rate, type, months, repay_method, status, due_date, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountId}, #{name}, #{amount}, #{rate}, #{type}, #{months}, #{repayMethod}, #{status}, #{dueDate}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM account_debt WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
